title: A projectile hit near Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant, killing a worker.
summary_full: There was no reported increase in radiation levels. A string of recent attacks near the Persian Gulf facility has fueled fears of a nuclear accident.
summary_public: There was no reported increase in radiation levels. A string of recent attacks near the Persian Gulf facility has fueled fears of a nuclear accident.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: A projectile hit near Iran’s Bushehr nuclear plant, killing a worker.
